section.div: 𝙀𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙮𝙩𝙝𝙞𝙣𝙜 𝙍𝙚𝙥𝙡𝙞𝙩, 𝙖𝙡𝙡 𝙖𝙩 𝙮𝙤𝙪𝙧 𝙙𝙞𝙨𝙥𝙤𝙨𝙖𝙡. This is the single most extensive Replit module, allowing you to access various parts of the site with just a few classes and methods. Written in Python. Maintained by @BD103 & @JBYT27.

The new Windows Terminal and the original Windows console host, all in the same place!
